headline: North America Adds 28 Rigs Week on Week
summary: North America added 28 rigs week on week, according to Baker Hughes' latest North America rotary rig count.

headline: Who will become the next chair of BP?
summary: BP has backed Amanda Blanc to lead the search for a new chair, despite opposition from investors and City figures. It comes after a number of significant shareholders in BP told the Financial Times they lost confidence in Blanc's ability to lead the search, after Albert Manifold's short stint as leader.
